item.title: Show HN: Darkdrive now open source (AGPLv3)
item.summary: Darkdrive, our simple and secure storage application is now open source under AGPLv3: https://github.com/plue-gmbh/darkdrive.de Contributions and feedback are welcome. Comments URL: https://news.ycombinator.com/item?id=48990649 Points: 1 # Comments: 0
